eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CHILD ABDUCTION EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Minnesota; at 6:15 AM on JUN 7, 2019 Effective until 7:15 AM. Message from MN BCA.
extra_text: This is a coordinated Minnesota Amber Alert.    This is a child abduction alert.    We interrupt this program to bring you this time sensitive message.    The Washington County Sheriff's Office is searching for two abducted Asian females children, ages 1 and 3 years old.     Police are looking for a suspect named Jeffrey Lo, a 24-year old Asian male in connection with this abduction.  He is approximately 5 feet 5 inches tall, 180 pounds with brown eyes and brown/black hair. Lo was last seen driving a Tan 2004 Toyota Sienna, license number 708XEM.    If you have any information regarding this missing children, call the Washington County Sheriff's Office at 651-439-9381 or 911.    Suspect is believed to be armed. Anyone who may locate the suspect should take no action other than contact the police as soon as possible. Stay tuned for further instructions.
